---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or API improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

### Problem
What are you trying to do? What's painful today?

### Proposed solution
What should the API look like? A code sketch helps:

```java
// proposed usage
```

### Alternatives considered
Other approaches you thought about and why you rejected them.

### Scope
Which module does this belong to? (`easy-pki-core`, `easy-pki-validation`, `easy-pki-spring-boot-starter`, `easy-pki-test`)

### Additional context
Links to similar APIs in other libraries, RFCs, standards, etc.
